title: AgentTeamLand Team Manifest
description: Schema for team.json — the manifest of an AgentTeamLand team package. Every team repository MUST have a team.json at its root that validates against this schema.

name.description: Package name. Must be kebab-case, 3-40 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens. Must be unique in the registry.

description.description: One-sentence description of what this team does. Shown in the registry catalog.

author.description: Author or maintainer of the team.

keywords.description: Search keywords for the registry. Kebab-case recommended.

repository.description: Git URL of this team's repository. MUST match the actual clone URL.

homepage.description: Optional homepage URL (docs site, landing page).

agents.description: List of agents this team provides. Each agent lives in agents/{name}/agent.md (+ children/).

name.description: Agent name (matches directory name under agents/).

skills.description: List of skills this team provides. Each skill lives in skills/{name}/skill.md.

rules.description: List of rules this team provides. Each rule lives in rules/{name}.md.

extends.description: Parent team name + version constraint (e.g. 'software-project-team@^1.0.0'). Parent's agents/skills/rules are inherited; children override by name. Use null for no parent.

excludes.description: Names of agents/skills/rules from the parent (transitively) to exclude from installation. Useful for opting out of an inherited agent you don't want.

dependencies.description: Packages this team depends on (other than the parent via 'extends'). Keys are package names, values are version constraints. Core is usually listed here.

atl.description: Minimum atl CLI version (or any constraint).
